title: ehretia lycioides
intro: Ehretia lycioides, also known as the yellow medinilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ehretia lycioides include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Ehretia lycioides is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
